title: Cross Totem 3D
description: A catholic cross resourcepack that turns the totem into a catholic cross and plays music when activated. 3D version.
body:
A catholic cross resourcepack that turns the totem into a catholic cross and plays music when activated. This is the **3D version** — every pixel of the cross is a fully modeled voxel.

> Looking for the original flat version? [Cross Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cross-totem)

![Cross Totem 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lSqs9CpE/images/ca9f1dfdaed8839c88de2d550ab1f90c7751e43d.png)
